prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低位次分别为约35163名→36445名→91568名→59217名→60437名。2023年出现异常断档（91568名），2024年大幅回升至59217名，2025 年基本持平于60437名，近两年位次趋于稳定在6万名左右。2025年基准位次约60437名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年177人、2022年183人、2023年180 人、2024年208人、2025年202人；2026年计划增至220人（较2025年扩招18人，增幅约8.9%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第83名→2022年第82名→2023年第80名→2024年第70名→2025年第69名→2026年第71名，整体处于全国70–80名区间，综合实力 稳中有升；2025年声誉评价偏负面（主要因就业率数据引发关注），但2026年声誉文件中无云南大学相关记录，说明近期无明显舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第62 位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显热度升温信号；历史投档异常记录中未见云南大学断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，民族学获评 A+、生态学获评A、统计学获评A-，共3个A-及以上学科，在211高校中具备一定学科竞争力，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，计算 机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，法学、临床医学保持偏热，而土木建筑、生化环材等持续劝退。云南大学招生专业涵盖计算机类、电子信息类、法学 、临床医学等热门方向，对考生吸引力较强。山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人（较2025年68.1万增长约5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争。云南大学位于云南省昆明市，距山东省较远，属于跨省就读。该校在山东省招生计划占其全国总招生计划的比例较高，2025年山东省招生占比约18.2%，说明山东 是云南大学重要的生源省份之一，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次60437名、2026年扩招8.9%（使位次数字增大）、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%（使竞争加 剧）、学校声誉平稳、抖音热度一般、优势学科吸引力等因素，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，整体竞争略有缓解。预测2026年最低位次约63168名，区间62668–63668名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约63168名，区间62668–63668名。位次在区间下限（62668名）以上的考生可重点冲刺一档热门专业（法学、计算机类、临床医学）；位次在区间中段（约63168名）的 考生以二档专业为主、一档为辅；位次在区间上限（63668名）附近的考生建议以二档保底、三档稳妥，同时可关注扩招带来的机会。云南大学民族学A+、生态学A、统计学A-等优 势学科对应的招生专业值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 35163 → 36445 → 91568 → 59217 → 60437. An abnormal gap occurred in 2023 (91568), with a significant recovery to 59217 in 2024, and basically stable at 60437 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings have stabilized around 60,000. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 60437. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province comprehensive category: 177 in 2021, 183 in 2022, 180 in 2023, 208 in 2024, 202 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 220 (an expansion of 18 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 8.9%), a relatively large expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been rising in recent years: 83rd in 2021 → 82nd in 2022 → 80th in 2023 → 70th in 2024 → 69th in 2025 → 71st in 2026, overall in the national 70–80 range, with stable and slightly improving comprehensive strength. The 2025 reputation evaluation was slightly negative (mainly due to employment rate data attracting attention), but the 2026 reputation file has no record of Yunnan University, indicating no recent significant public opinion incidents. Douyin heat total ranking is 62nd, rated as "average", with medium exposure on short video platforms and no obvious heat increase signal. No abnormal filing records for Yunnan University in historical filing anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology was rated A+, Ecology rated A, and Statistics rated A-, totaling 3 disciplines rated A- or above, giving the university certain disciplinary competitiveness among 211 universities and attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity analysis shows that engineering majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, Law and Clinical Medicine remain relatively popular, while Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials continue to be discouraged. Yunnan University's enrollment majors include popular directions such as Computer, Electronic Information, Law, and Clinical Medicine, which are attractive to candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000 (an increase of about 5.7% from 681,000 in 2025), with the expansion of candidates intensifying competition. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, Yunnan Province, far from Shandong Province, requiring cross-province study. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province accounts for a relatively high proportion of its total national enrollment plan. In 2025, the Shandong enrollment proportion was about 18.2%, indicating that Shandong is one of the important source provinces for Yunnan University, with stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 60437, the 2026 expansion of 8.9% (which increases the ranking number), the increase in Shandong candidates by about 5.7% (which intensifies competition), stable university reputation, average Douyin heat, and the attractiveness of advantageous disciplines, the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, and overall competition is slightly alleviated. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 63168, with a range of 62668–63668.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 63168, range 62668–63668. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit of the range (62668) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Law, Computer, Clinical Medicine); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 63168) should mainly target Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a supplement; candidates near the upper limit of the range (63668) are advised to use Tier 2 as a safety and Tier 3 as a stable choice, while also paying attention to opportunities brought by the expansion. Yunnan University's advantageous disciplines such as Ethnology A+, Ecology A, and Statistics A- correspond to enrollment majors worth special attention.
